ValidationRule.description: Force the user to provide a reason code when the Opportunity Stage is Closed-No Bid and Closed-Lost
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Closed-No Bid"), ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Closed Lost") ), ISBLANK(Close_Narrative__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please provide the Closed / Lost Narrative.
